title: Do Not Disturb
writer: Milt Rosen, Richard L. Breen, William Fairchild
actors: Doris Day, Rod Taylor, Hermione Baddeley
plot: When American couple Janet (Doris Day) and Mike (Rod Taylor) move to England for his business, she soon fears he's having an affair with his attractive secretary and decides to get back at him by pretending she has been unfaithful.
